home.heroDesc: The easiest way to recover your lost wallet password and investigate stolen cryptocurrency
home.why1Title: We will recover your locked wallet
home.why1Desc: Our user panel allows you to upload data at any time
home.why2Title: Your wallet will be air-gap protected
home.why2Desc: We guarantee that the encrypted wallet backup will be stored on our servers
home.why3Title: Your forgotten password will be recovered
home.why3Desc: Our user panel allows you to upload data at any time
home.s1Desc: You thought you knew your password, but now it won't unlock your wallet. It may use different digits or a different capital letter than you remember.
home.s2Desc: You wrote down a list of words and the passphrase is some combination of those words.
home.s3Title: Lost access to a major network wallet
home.s3Desc: You've lost access to a common crypto asset such as Bitcoin, Ethereum, Litecoin, Dogecoin, NFT, or dozens of other altcoins.
home.s4Desc: We offer tracing services (not recovery) for those who want to build their case and possibly reveal the real identity of the scammer.
home.faq1A: The methods we use to recover our clients' accounts vary greatly depending on the specific case. For password recovery, we guide clients through extracting an encrypted private key backup and compiling a full list of possible password variants. The data is then sent to secure servers to brute-force billions of possible combinations.
home.faq2Q: Do I need to tell you my full password?
home.faq2A: No. We only ask for information necessary to regain access. A partial phrase, a set of words, or the password structure is enough to get started.
home.faq3Q: How long does wallet recovery take?
home.faq3A: The process usually takes from a few days to several weeks, depending on the complexity of the case, the amount of data, and current load on research resources.
home.faq4Q: How can I trust you won't steal my money?
home.faq4A: All our processes are transparent. We do not request full access to private keys and only work with information you provide yourself. Client reviews confirm the quality of our work.
home.faq5Q: What types of cryptocurrency wallets do you recover?
home.faq5A: We work with Bitcoin, Ethereum, Litecoin, Solana, and most popular wallets, including hardware and software solutions.

about.title: About Us
about.content: We offer the best asset management solutions.
about.section2Title:
We guarantee your
cryptocurrency always
stays with you
about.section2Text: The methods we use to recover our clients' accounts vary greatly depending on the specific case. For password recovery, we guide our clients through extracting an encrypted private key backup and compiling a full list of possible password variants. We then send client data to secure password-cracking servers that use the information provided to brute-force billions or trillions of possible password combinations until the correct password is found.
about.foundersText:
CryptoAssetRecovery.com was created to help cryptocurrency owners secure their assets. The company was founded in 2017 by Chris Brooks, an experienced technology professional with a rich industry background. He previously served as VP of Technology at Carescout and a programmer at Fidelity Investments.
In 2021, the company became a family business when Chris's son Charles joined the team. Charles is a computer science student at the University of Vermont who brings fresh perspective and extensive technical knowledge.
Together, Chris and Charles are leaders in the field of cryptocurrency asset recovery, helping bring mass adoption of cryptocurrencies to the world.

pricing.title: Pricing
pricing.desc1: We understand that entrusting your assets to us is a serious matter. That's why we take our work recovering your lost assets very seriously. Our expertise and knowledge in cryptocurrency asset recovery is what sets us apart, and it's what allows us to crack wallet passwords so you can get your assets back.
pricing.desc2: We also know that the cryptocurrency asset recovery process often involves sensitive personal and financial information, so we handle each case with the highest level of security and confidentiality.
pricing.desc3: For password recovery, we charge a commission of 20% of the recovered tokens, reflecting the value we bring to the table through our expertise and secure handling of each case.
pricing.desc4: And here's the best part: our service is safe! This means you only pay us if your assets are successfully recovered. If we can't crack the wallet, you don't pay a cent. We believe actions should match words, and we're confident in our ability to recover your assets.

news.title: News
news.article1Title: Father-son team says they recovered $6M in lost cryptocurrency
news.article1Excerpt: Professional crypto wallet recovery specialists helped a family recover their lost funds.
news.article1Content:
A team of professional cryptocurrency wallet recovery specialists announced the successful completion of one of the most complex cases in their practice. A father and son who lost access to their wallet containing $6M in Bitcoin sought help after years of unsuccessful attempts to recover access on their own.

The recovery process took about three weeks and required the use of specialized software and years of experience working with cryptographic algorithms. The specialists applied a comprehensive approach including analysis of partial mnemonic phrases and the use of high-performance computing resources.

"We never lost hope, but we were starting to accept that the money was gone forever," said one of the clients. "What the Navis Asset team did is a true miracle."

Salvador — the Bitcoin country. In 2021, El Salvador became the first country in the world to adopt Bitcoin as legal tender. This decision sparked a wave of interest in cryptocurrencies and, as a result, an increase in cases of lost wallet access.
news.article2Title: New Ethereum wallet recovery methods show high effectiveness
news.article2Excerpt: Specialists have developed new algorithms for working with lost Ethereum wallets.
news.article2Content: The Navis Asset team has introduced new methods for recovering access to Ethereum wallets. Innovative algorithms allow working even with partially lost seed phrases.
news.article3Title: How to protect your crypto wallet: tips from experts
news.article3Excerpt: Our specialists share best practices for securing crypto assets.
news.article3Content: The security of cryptocurrency assets is one of the key concerns for every investor. Our experts have prepared a comprehensive guide to protecting wallets.
news.article4Excerpt: Analysts forecast cryptocurrency market growth due to the Bitcoin halving.
news.article4Content: The cryptocurrency market is showing steady growth in 2024. The main catalyst was the anticipated reduction in Bitcoin mining rewards.
news.article5Title: Successful recovery of $2.3M USDT for a European client
news.article5Excerpt: Another successful case: a European investor recovered lost stablecoins.
news.article5Content: A client from Germany came to us after losing access to a wallet containing $2.3M in USDT. Within two weeks, specialists successfully restored access to the funds.
news.article6Title: DeFi and risks: what every investor needs to know
news.article6Excerpt: Decentralized finance opens new opportunities but brings new risks.
news.article6Content: The decentralized finance (DeFi) sector continues to grow rapidly. Navis Asset experts analyze the main risks and ways to minimize them.
